name: /plugin-install rejects a plugin.yaml that does not declare a rules array (the manifest contract requires at least one rule)
command: mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/empty && printf 'name: empty\n' > stub-clones/acme/empty/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/empty --gh-clone-stub stub-clones 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'plugin_yaml_invalid' err.txt && grep -q 'missing.*rules' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
